name: Source Fidelity review for Autophagy Induction bundle
summary: Source fidelity passes for revision 1. ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 checks on June 11, 2026 matched the staged NCT titles, status, enrollment, completion timing, no-results state, interventions, and endpoint boundaries for NCT06445569, NCT07383311, NCT06186102, NCT04928963, and NCT05593549. PubMed ESummary/EFetch matched PMID 42086115 metadata, DOI, publication timing, authors, review scope, and conflict statement. The staged records avoid treating registry absence of results as efficacy evidence.

findings.claim_or_issue: Some ClinicalTrials.gov completion dates are month-level values rather than exact days.
findings.why_it_matters: Structured date fields require full ISO dates, so the staged study records normalize month-only dates to the first day of the month.
findings.recommended_action: No revision required. The free-text expected-results and horizon notes preserve the month-level precision and prevent readers from treating the normalized day as exact.
